^(deprecation_note)$.description: Explains why this action is deprecated and what users should use instead.

^(display_name)$.description: The name shown to users in the UI, e.g. "Send Email".

^(updated_at)$.description: When this action definition was last changed.

deprecationNote.description: Explains why this action is deprecated and what users should use instead.

description.description: A short explanation of what this action does, shown to users when selecting or reviewing it.

disabled.description: When true, this action is not available for execution. Users will see an error if they attempt to run it.

displayName.description: The name shown to users in the UI, e.g. "Send Email".

input.description: Describes the shape of data the user must provide when executing this action.

labels.description: Key/value tags for filtering and organizing actions in the UI.

name.description: Unique identifier for this action, e.g. `actions/send-email`.

output.description: Describes the shape of data returned to the user after execution.

updatedAt.description: When this action definition was last changed.

version.description: The version of this action definition, e.g. "1.0.0".
